about.title: About Grand Motors
about.description: Grand Motors is a premium car rental service. We offer an exclusive collection of supercars, luxury sedans, and SUVs for those who value comfort, style, and speed.
about.description2: Our mission is to make dreams accessible. Every car in our fleet undergoes thorough inspection and preparation before each rental.
about.ctaDesc: Choose your dream car and book it right now

teamMembers.name: Ramzan Dudaev
teamMembers.description: 15 years of experience in the automotive business. Built Grand Motors from scratch into a premium service.

teamMembers.name: Magomed Isaev
teamMembers.description: Ensures a flawless experience for every client. Built the 24/7 support system.

teamMembers.name: Ruslan Khasanov
teamMembers.description: Certified Ferrari and Lamborghini specialist. Every car passes through his hands.

whyUs.title: No Deposit
whyUs.desc: Rent without frozen funds — we trust our clients

whyUs.title: Insurance Included
whyUs.desc: Full comprehensive and liability insurance included, no extra charges

whyUs.title: Delivery in 2 Hours
whyUs.desc: We deliver the car anywhere in the city within 2 hours of confirmation

whyUs.title: Personal Manager 24/7
whyUs.desc: Your dedicated manager is always available — day and night

whyUs.title: Cleaning & Detailing
whyUs.desc: Every car undergoes professional wash and detailing before delivery

faq.q: How do I book a car?
faq.a: Choose a car, select dates, and submit a request. A manager will contact you within 15 minutes.
Passport and driving license. We take care of everything else.

faq.q: How does the car handover work?
faq.a: We deliver the car wherever you say. Together we inspect the car, sign the documents, and hand over the keys.

faq.q: What is the minimum age to rent?
faq.a: From 21 years old with at least 2 years of driving experience.
Any convenient method: cash, card, or cryptocurrency.
Of course. If your plans change, contact us 24 hours before the scheduled delivery. We'll cancel with no penalties or questions.

footer.description: Premium supercar and luxury car rental

sections.title: 1. General Provisions
sections.text: This Privacy Policy defines the procedure for processing and protecting personal data of Grand Motors website users. By using the website, you agree to the terms of this policy.

sections.title: 2. Information Collection
sections.text: We collect information that you provide when filling out the booking form: name, phone number, rental dates, and comments. This information is used solely to process your request.

sections.title: 3. Data Usage
sections.text: Collected data is used for: processing rental requests, contacting clients, and improving service quality. We do not share your data with third parties without your consent.

sections.title: 4. Data Protection
sections.text: We use modern information security methods to prevent unauthorized access, modification, or destruction of personal data.

sections.title: 5. Cookies
sections.text: The website may use cookies to improve user experience. You can disable cookies in your browser settings.

sections.title: 6. Contacts
sections.text: For questions related to personal data processing, you can contact us via the email address listed in the contacts section.

notFound.subtitle: Page Not Found
